description_long: This is a large, modern school complex set on a spacious green campus. The main building features a flat roof and multiple interconnected rectangular sections, likely housing classrooms, administrative offices, and common areas. Surrounding the main structure are various outdoor facilities, including a tennis court, a playground area with equipment, a small pool, and several outbuildings such as sheds and gazebos. The grounds are landscaped with grassy lawns and a few scattered trees, and there are paved walkways connecting the different areas. The campus also includes a fenced area, possibly for sports or secure play, and a parking or drop-off zone. The overall layout is open and organized, designed to accommodate both educational and recreational activities.
description: A modern school complex with a flat-roofed main building, surrounded by sports courts, playgrounds, and landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main school building, tennis court, playground, and several outbuildings on a large green lawn.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the tennis court, main building, and various outdoor facilities including a pool and playground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building, outbuildings, and a clear view of the tennis court and fenced area.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the playground equipment, tennis court, and the spatial arrangement of the campus structures.
